results.descricao: requireRefreshAuth token check invertido — válido rejeitado, inválido aceito
results.sintoma: token correto rejeitado; qualquer token inválido aceito no refresh

```json
{
  "diagnosis": "Condition in requireRefreshAuth function inverted from `candidate !== expectedToken` to `candidate === expectedToken`, causing all valid refresh tokens to be rejected with 401.",
  "file": "backend/src/routes/newsRoutes.js",
  "fix_type": "code_patch",
  "patch": {
    "search": "if (!expectedToken || candidate === expectedToken) {",
    "replace": "if (!expectedToken || candidate !== expectedToken) {"
  },
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "decisao": "NEEDS_FIX"
}
```

The bug reverses the authentication logic, blocking all authorized refresh requests. The correct check is that the candidate must **not** equal the expectedToken to reject.
